nodes.name: products.js
nodes.summary: Admin catalog/inventory management endpoint — lists merged catalog, inventory, and pricing rows for the admin dashboard (including orphaned inventory), patches stock/status/SKU on inventory rows, and creates new inventory rows for catalog products.

nodes.name: buildAdminCatalogProductRow
nodes.summary: Assembles one admin product-list row by merging a catalog product with its inventory row and pricing-override data.

nodes.name: buildAdminOrphanInventoryRow
nodes.summary: Builds an admin row for an inventory record that has no matching catalog product ('orphan' inventory).

nodes.name: applyInventoryStatusPayload
nodes.summary: Normalizes and applies a status change (active/inactive/discontinued/draft/archived) onto an inventory update payload.

nodes.name: onRequestGet
nodes.summary: Admin GET handler that merges catalog, inventory, and pricing-override data into a combined product list for the admin dashboard, including orphaned inventory rows.

nodes.name: onRequestPatch
nodes.summary: Admin PATCH handler that updates stock, status, and SKU fields on a product_inventory row after permission and payload validation.

nodes.name: onRequestPost
nodes.summary: Admin POST handler that creates a new product_inventory row for a catalog product with initial stock, thresholds, and status.

nodes.name: effective-prices.js
nodes.summary: Public read-only endpoint returning effective (sale/override-aware) prices for the entire catalog, used by the storefront to display current pricing without exposing admin-only fields.

nodes.name: onRequestGet
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests, loading active price overrides and computing effective pricing for every catalog product into a slug-keyed response map.

nodes.name: get-orders.js
nodes.summary: Authenticated endpoint that returns a customer's paginated order history, merging order items, shipments, status events, invoices, and return requests, enriched with catalog product data.

nodes.name: resolveOrderItem
nodes.summary: Enriches a raw order-item row with catalog product data (name, image, url) resolved by handle or name.

nodes.name: publicInvoice
nodes.summary: Shapes an invoice_records row into the customer-facing invoice fields exposed by the API.

nodes.name: publicReturn
nodes.summary: Shapes a return_requests row into the customer-facing return-request fields exposed by the API.

nodes.name: onRequestGet
nodes.summary: Authenticates the requesting user, then loads and merges their orders with items, shipments, status events, invoices, and returns into a paginated response.

nodes.name: [[path]].js
nodes.summary: Monolithic Cloudflare Pages Function implementing the full product-reviews API — public review listing/creation/voting, photo upload with real image-type detection, and admin moderation of reviews and review images — using a self-contained Supabase REST client.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements its own minimal Supabase REST wrapper (supabaseRequest/selectRows/insertRows/updateRows/deleteRows) rather than reusing functions/api/_lib/supabase.js, duplicating that module's responsibility within a single 1200+ line route file.

nodes.name: supabaseRequest
nodes.summary: Low-level fetch wrapper that signs and sends a REST request to the Supabase PostgREST/storage API with service-role auth.

nodes.name: insertRows
nodes.summary: Inserts one or more rows into a Supabase table via the file's local REST client.

nodes.name: updateRows
nodes.summary: Updates rows matching filter criteria in a Supabase table via the file's local REST client.

nodes.name: deleteRows
nodes.summary: Deletes rows matching filter criteria from a Supabase table via the file's local REST client.

nodes.name: buildReviewImageModerationPayload
nodes.summary: Builds the patch payload used to approve or reject a review image, including moderator and timestamp fields.

nodes.name: buildReviewImageModerationPatchVariants
nodes.summary: Builds fallback patch payload variants to tolerate optional moderation columns that may not exist in the database yet.

nodes.name: logReviewImageModerationFailure
nodes.summary: Logs a structured warning when review-image moderation patch attempts fail across all fallback variants.

nodes.name: patchReviewImageRows
nodes.summary: Applies a moderation status patch to review-image rows, retrying with fallback payload variants on schema errors.

nodes.name: patchReviewImagesByQuery
nodes.summary: Patches review-image rows matching a query filter with a new moderation status, with fallback handling for missing columns.

nodes.name: approvePendingReviewImages
nodes.summary: Auto-approves all pending images attached to a review once the review itself is approved by a moderator.

nodes.name: detectImageType
nodes.summary: Sniffs an uploaded file's binary header to detect its real image MIME type/extension, guarding against spoofed content types.

nodes.name: resolveNextReviewImageSortOrder
nodes.summary: Computes the next sort_order value for a newly uploaded review image.

nodes.name: buildReviewImageInsertPayload
nodes.summary: Builds the database insert payload for a newly uploaded review image, including storage path, dimensions, and moderation defaults.

nodes.name: resolveProduct
nodes.summary: Resolves the catalog product referenced by a review's product slug or handle.

nodes.name: mapImage
nodes.summary: Maps a raw review_images database row into the public API image shape with resolved public URLs.

nodes.name: mapReview
nodes.summary: Maps a raw review database row (plus its images) into the public API review shape, applying visibility rules for non-owner viewers.

nodes.name: buildSummary
nodes.summary: Aggregates a product's approved reviews into a rating summary (average rating, count, and star distribution).

nodes.name: getUserFromRequest
nodes.summary: Resolves the authenticated Supabase user from the request's bearer token, if present.

nodes.name: requireUser
nodes.summary: Requires an authenticated user for the current request, throwing a 401-style error otherwise.

nodes.name: sanitizeReviewPayload
nodes.summary: Strips and trims a raw review submission payload down to the allowed editable fields.

nodes.name: validateReviewPayload
nodes.summary: Validates a review submission's required fields (rating, title, body length) before persistence.

nodes.name: sanitizeImages
nodes.summary: Filters and normalizes the image list attached to a review submission.

nodes.name: insertReviewImages
nodes.summary: Inserts the review-image rows associated with a newly created review.

nodes.name: hasPurchasedProduct
nodes.summary: Checks whether the requesting user has a delivered/paid order containing the product, to grant 'verified purchase' status on a review.

nodes.name: handlePublicList
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests for a product's public, approved reviews with pagination, sorting, and a rating summary.

nodes.name: handleCreateReview
nodes.summary: Handles authenticated review creation, validating purchase eligibility, sanitizing input, and inserting the review with any attached images.

nodes.name: handleUpdateReview
nodes.summary: Handles authenticated edits to a user's own review, re-validating fields and marking the review as edited.

nodes.name: handleCreateImages
nodes.summary: Handles attaching additional images to an existing review the requesting user owns.

nodes.name: uploadReviewPhoto
nodes.summary: Handles multipart photo upload for a review: validates ownership, size, and type, detects the real image type, uploads to Supabase storage, and inserts the review-image row.

nodes.name: handleHelpful
nodes.summary: Handles the 'mark review as helpful' vote endpoint, incrementing the review's helpful_count.

nodes.name: handleAdminList
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint listing all reviews, including unapproved ones, for moderation.

nodes.name: handleAdminReviewUpdate
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint that approves or rejects a review and cascades approval to its pending images.

nodes.name: handleAdminImageUpdate
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint that approves or rejects an individual review image.

nodes.name: handleAdminImageDelete
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint that deletes a review image row and its underlying storage object.

nodes.name: onRequest
nodes.summary: Top-level router dispatching incoming requests to the appropriate public or admin review/review-image handler based on path and method, with rate limiting.
